case_title: IDRIES AZIZ-PEARSON VS. MAC'S CHILDREN AND FAMILY SERVICES

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF AZIZ-PEARSON, IDRIES AS TO DEFENDANT MAC'S CHILDREN AND FAMILY SERVICES A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
